channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scientists discover hidden âfootprints of deathâ that may help viruses spread
item.description: Scientists have found a surprising new twist in cell death. As dying cells break apart, they leave behind tiny âfootprints of deathâ that...

item.title: The universe may be hiding conscious minds stranger than we can imagine
item.description: What if consciousness isnât limited to brains like ours? Philosophers Eric Schwitzgebel and Jeremy Pober argue it could arise in many...

item.title: Early humans carried fire into caves 1.8 million years ago
item.description: A study indicates early humans used fire in South Africa's Wonderwerk Cave around 1.79 million years ago. Researchers found burned bo...

item.title: Ancient brain cells that block distractions discovered by scientists
item.description: Scientists identified a small group of neurons in an ancient brain region that acts as a built-in focus filter, helping the brain ignore distrac...
